PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WAN, JIA WEI TENG, YONG RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIE, JOSEPHINE $5,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $807.85 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,307.85, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR: PLAINTIFF JIA WEI WAN TO HAVE $5000; PLAINTIFF YOUNG TENG TO HAVE $500. STATUTORY COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFFS.
